# SEO & AI Optimization Skill

## Overview

This skill automatically applies comprehensive SEO and AI search optimization to any website, ensuring maximum visibility across traditional search engines and AI assistants like Google Bard, Bing Copilot, and others.

## What It Does

### 🔍 **AI Search Optimization**
- Enhanced structured data (Schema.org) for AI understanding
- AI-specific meta tags and classifications
- Comprehensive robots.txt with AI bot directives
- RSS feed setup for content syndication

### 📊 **Technical SEO**
- Detailed XML sitemaps with image/video extensions
- Proper meta tags and Open Graph optimization
- Social media bot permissions
- Preconnect directives for search engines

### 🎯 **Content Structure**
- Semantic HTML optimization
- FAQ schema implementation
- Service catalog structured data
- Business profile enhancement

## Usage

Apply this skill to any website project to automatically optimize for AI search visibility.

### Quick Apply
```bash
# Run the skill on your project
seo-ai-optimize --apply
```

### Manual Configuration
The skill will prompt for:
- Business type and services
- Target audience and location
- Social media profiles
- Content categories

## Generated Files

### Core SEO Files
- `robots.txt` - AI-friendly crawler directives
- `sitemap.xml` - Comprehensive site structure
- `blog/rss.xml` - Content syndication feed

### HTML Enhancements
- Enhanced `<head>` section with AI meta tags
- Structured data (JSON-LD) schemas
- Open Graph and Twitter Card optimization
- Preconnect directives for performance

### Structured Data Types
- `ProfessionalService` schema
- `FAQPage` schema
- `Organization` schema
- `OfferCatalog` schema

## AI Search Engines Supported

### Traditional Search AI
- **Google AI/Bard** - Enhanced knowledge panels
- **Bing AI/Copilot** - Business profile integration
- **Yahoo AI** - Search result enrichment
- **DuckDuckGo AI** - Privacy-focused indexing

### Social AI & Discovery
- **Facebook AI** - Rich link previews
- **Twitter/X AI** - Card optimization
- **LinkedIn AI** - Professional networking
- **WhatsApp AI** - Social sharing

### Specialized AI
- **GitHub Copilot** - Code context understanding
- **ChatGPT Plugins** - Structured data parsing
- **Business AI Tools** - Professional service recognition

## Configuration Options

### Business Information
```yaml
business:
  name: "Your Business Name"
  type: "ProfessionalService"
  location: "Northern Ireland"
  services: ["Consulting", "Strategy", "Marketing"]
```

### AI Optimization Level
- `basic` - Essential meta tags and structured data
- `comprehensive` - Full AI optimization suite
- `enterprise` - Advanced schemas and multi-language support

## Success Metrics

### Immediate (1-2 weeks)
- ✅ Enhanced search result snippets
- ✅ Better AI assistant responses
- ✅ Improved social media previews

### Medium-term (1-3 months)
- 📈 Higher AI-powered search rankings
- 📈 Increased organic AI referrals
- 📈 Better featured snippet opportunities

### Long-term (3-6 months)
- 🏆 Stronger domain authority with AI systems
- 🏆 Enhanced integration with AI business tools
- 🏆 Superior social AI sharing performance

## Dependencies

- None (works with any static site generator)
- Compatible with: HTML, Jekyll, Hugo, Next.js, Gatsby, etc.

## Examples

### Basic Application
```bash
# Optimize a simple business website
seo-ai-optimize --business-type="consultancy" --location="Northern Ireland"
```

### Advanced Configuration
```bash
# Full optimization with custom schemas
seo-ai-optimize \
  --config="enterprise" \
  --schemas="ProfessionalService,FAQPage,Review" \
  --social="linkedin,twitter,facebook"
```

## Troubleshooting

### Common Issues
- **Structured data not validating**: Check JSON-LD syntax
- **Sitemap not updating**: Ensure file permissions allow writes
- **AI search not reflecting changes**: Allow 24-48 hours for re-indexing

### Validation Tools
- Google Rich Results Test
- Schema.org validator
- Bing Webmaster Tools
- AI search testing tools
